_metadata.title: Obligations of providers of high-risk AI systems

published: ISO/IEC 42001:2023 — AI management system (provider obligations framework)

obligations.source_quote: Providers of high-risk AI systems shall: (a) ensure that their high-risk AI systems are compliant with the requirements set out in Section 2;
obligations.addressee_note: Provider of a high-risk AI system (as defined in Art. 3(3))

decomposed_atoms.description: High-risk AI system meets all requirements in Chapter III Section 2 (Art. 8-15)
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL ensure compliance with Art. 8-15 requirements (risk management, data governance, technical documentation, record-keeping, transparency, human oversight, accuracy/robustness)

obligations.source_quote: indicate on the high-risk AI system or, where that is not possible, on its packaging or its accompanying documentation, as applicable, their name, registered trade name or registered trade mark, the address at which they can be contacted;
obligations.addressee_note: Provider of a high-risk AI system

decomposed_atoms.description: Provider name/trademark and contact address on system, packaging, or documentation
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL indicate their name, registered trade name or trade mark, and contact address on the AI system itself or its packaging or accompanying documentation

obligations.source_quote: have a quality management system in place which complies with Article 17;
obligations.addressee_note: Provider of a high-risk AI system

decomposed_atoms.description: A quality management system compliant with Art. 17 is in place
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL have a quality management system that complies with Art. 17

obligations.source_quote: keep the documentation referred to in Article 18;
obligations.addressee_note: Provider of a high-risk AI system

decomposed_atoms.description: Documentation as specified in Art. 18 is maintained
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL keep the documentation referred to in Art. 18

obligations.source_quote: when under their control, keep the logs automatically generated by their high-risk AI systems as referred to in Article 19;
obligations.addressee_note: Provider of a high-risk AI system

decomposed_atoms.description: Automatically generated logs are retained when under provider's control
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL keep automatically generated logs as referred to in Art. 19, when the logs are under their control

obligations.source_quote: ensure that the high-risk AI system undergoes the relevant conformity assessment procedure as referred to in Article 43, prior to its being placed on the market or put into service;
obligations.addressee_note: Provider of a high-risk AI system

decomposed_atoms.description: Conformity assessment per Art. 43 is done before market placement
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL ensure the high-risk AI system undergoes the relevant conformity assessment procedure prior to placement on the market or putting into service

obligations.source_quote: draw up an EU declaration of conformity in accordance with Article 47;
obligations.addressee_note: Provider of a high-risk AI system

decomposed_atoms.description: EU declaration of conformity per Art. 47 is prepared
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL draw up an EU declaration of conformity in accordance with Art. 47

obligations.source_quote: affix the CE marking to the high-risk AI system or, where that is not possible, on its packaging or its accompanying documentation, to indicate conformity with this Regulation, in accordance with Article 48;
obligations.addressee_note: Provider of a high-risk AI system

decomposed_atoms.description: CE marking applied to system, packaging, or documentation
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL affix the CE marking to the AI system or its packaging or documentation to indicate conformity

obligations.source_quote: comply with the registration obligations referred to in Article 49(1);
obligations.addressee_note: Provider of a high-risk AI system

decomposed_atoms.description: Registration in EU database per Art. 49(1) is completed
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL comply with registration obligations in Art. 49(1)

obligations.source_quote: take the necessary corrective actions and provide information as required in Article 20;
obligations.addressee_note: Provider of a high-risk AI system

decomposed_atoms.description: Process for corrective actions and information provision per Art. 20
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL take necessary corrective actions and provide information as required in Art. 20

obligations.source_quote: upon a reasoned request of a national competent authority, demonstrate the conformity of the high-risk AI system with the requirements set out in Section 2;
obligations.addressee_note: Provider of a high-risk AI system

decomposed_atoms.description: Provider can demonstrate Section 2 conformity when requested by authority
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL be able to demonstrate conformity with Section 2 requirements upon a reasoned request of a national competent authority

obligations.source_quote: ensure that the high-risk AI system complies with accessibility requirements in accordance with Directives (EU) 2016/2102 and (EU) 2019/882.
obligations.addressee_note: Provider of a high-risk AI system

decomposed_atoms.description: System meets accessibility requirements per EU accessibility directives
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL ensure the high-risk AI system complies with accessibility requirements in Directives (EU) 2016/2102 and (EU) 2019/882
